title: Branded Types

statement.markdown:
## Branded Types
### Requirements
1. Create a branded type for a person with properties `name` and `age`.
2. Create an array of branded types and use the `infer` keyword to extract the type within the array.
3. Use the `infer` keyword to create a union type of branded types.
4. Create a function that accepts a branded type as an argument and returns a formatted string with the `name` and `age` properties.
5. Add a constraint to the branded type to ensure it has at least 1 property with an `age` property.

constraints: No third-party libraries can be used.
All branded types must have at least one property with an `age` property.

gradingCriteria.description: Using `infer` to extract the type within the array.
Using `infer` to create a union type of branded types.
Creating a function that accepts a branded type as an argument and returns a formatted string.
Adding a constraint to the branded type to ensure it has at least 1 property with an `age` property.
